DataRequest.Name: Windows Suspicious Logon Failures / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects suspicious logon failures for the following reasons - account disabled, time of day violation, forbidden logon, error during logon, account locked out
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Windows Suspicious Logon Failures from $user on $hostName

SubPattern.name: Download
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN ("Win-Security-680-failure","Win-Security-4776","Win-Security-4625") AND user IS NOT NULL AND winLogonFailCode2 IN ("0xC0000072","0xC000006F","0xC0000070","0xC0000413","0xC000018C")
